name: Taller Santa Clara
brandContext: Taller Santa Clara es una marca de ropa artesanal argentina. Fabrican remeras, polos y prendas básicas con algodón orgánico de alta calidad. Su tono es cercano, auténtico y aspiracional. Target: hombres 25-40, urbanos, que valoran la calidad y el diseño simple. Estilo de comunicación: directo, cálido, con un toque de craft/artesanal. Usan español rioplatense.

products.name: Product
products.description: This product is an orange plastic bottle of laundry detergent, displayed upright against a white background. The bottle has an ergonomic, slightly hourglass silhouette with an integrated handle on the right side and a clear, faceted plastic measuring cap. Its smooth, glossy surface features a prominent label on the front, displaying "AMERICA FRESH" in blue text over a blue wave graphic, surrounded by orange and red bubbles. Small icons like "32" and "HE," along with "Original" and "CONT. 2L," are also visible on the label.
